def negative_typed_dict_key_access_without_get_or_guard():
    rule_id = "typed_dict_key_access_without_get_or_guard"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "TypedDict with total=False has a key accessed via direct subscript without .get() or a guard."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
